title: aster fragilis var. tenuiculus
intro: Aster fragilis var. tenuiculus, also known as Fragile Aster or Small White Aster, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family, characterized by its small white or pinkish flowers. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Aster fragilis var. tenuiculus include relief from fever, cough, and cold, as well as soothing of skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by drying and processing the flowers and leaves.
